    Hook method called each time an exception is raised in a client thread.

    AbstractServer.handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles a command sent from one client to the server.

    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.

    This method is used to handle messages coming from the client.

    CustomerController.getAllSubscribers(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all customers/subscribers from the database.

    CustomerController.getSubscriberById(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves a subscriber by their Subscriber Code (ID).

    Handles the specific update for checking out (payment and freeing table).

    Main handler method that processes incoming requests for the TABLE resource.

    Main handler for Waiting List requests.
    private boolean
    OrderController.handleCheckAvailability(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Checks if tables are available for the requested time and size.
    private boolean
    OrderController.handleCreate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles the creation of a new order.
    private void
    TableController.handleCreate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Creates a new table in the database.
    private void
    BusinessHourController.handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Deletes a specific opening hour entry based on the date.
    private void
    OrderController.handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Deletes (Cancels) an order and releases the table if currently seated.
    private void
    TableController.handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Deletes a table from the database based on the ID provided in the request.
    private void
    WaitingListController.handleEnterWaitingList(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles the process of entering a customer into the waiting list.
    private void
    WaitingListController.handleExitWaitingList(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Removes an entry from the waiting list based on the Waiting List ID.
    private void
    BusinessHourController.handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all defined opening hours from the database.
    private void
    OrderController.handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all orders from the database.
    private void
    TableController.handleGetAll(ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all tables from the database and sends them to the client.
    private void
    WaitingListController.handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all waiting list entries from the database.
    private void
    OrderController.handleGetAllBySubscriberId(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves the order history for a subscriber.
    private void
    WaitingListController.handleGetAllListWithCustomer(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all waiting list entries joined with customer details (as a Map).
    private void
    OrderController.handleGetByCode(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves an order by its confirmation code, used specifically during checkout/seating.
    private void
    OrderController.handleGetById(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves a single order by its DB ID.
    private void
    MyFileController.handleGetMonthlyReport(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Processes a request to download a monthly report.
    private void
    ReportController.handleGetMonthlyReport(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Processes the monthly report request.
    private void
    OrderController.handleGetSubscriberApprovedOrders(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber.
    private void
    TableController.handleGetTable(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles the check-in process for a customer.
    private void
    WaitingListController.handleGetWaitingListByDate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves the waiting list filtered by a specific date.
    private void
    OrderController.handleIdentifyAtTerminal(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles customer arrival at the terminal.
    void
    ServerController.handleMessageFromClient(Object msg, ConnectionToClient client)
    Receives an Object/Request from the client and delegates it to the router.
    private void
    OrderController.handlePayBill(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Calculates final bill with subscriber discounts and frees the physical table.
    boolean
    WaitingListController.handlePromoteToOrder(Integer waitingId, ConnectionToClient client)
    Promotes a waiting list entry to an active order.
    private void
    OrderController.handleResendConfirmation(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Resends confirmation code (creates a new code) if the customer lost it.
    private void
    BusinessHourController.handleSave(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Saves new opening hours or updates existing ones.
    private void
    OrderController.handleSendEmail(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Sends an email notification (General usage).
    private void
    BusinessHourController.handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles updates to business status (open/close).
    private void
    OrderController.handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Updates general order details.
    private void
    TableController.handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Updates an existing table in the database.
    private void
    EmployeeController.processLogin(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles employee login.
    private void
    EmployeeController.processRegister(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Registers a new employee.
    private void
    EmployeeController.processRegisterSubscriber(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles the registration of a new subscriber.
    private void
    EmployeeController.processupdateEmploye(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Updates an existing employee's details.
    private void
    CustomerController.registerCustomer(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Registers a new customer in the database.

    Router.removeClientOffline(ConnectionToClient client)
    Removes a client connection from the active clients list.

    Routes the incoming request to the appropriate controller based on the ResourceType.

    CustomerController.updateSubscriber(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Updates an existing subscriber's details.
